[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 0101000 2
2 0101000 2
3 0000110 2
4 1011111 6
5 1011000 3
6 0010011 3
7 0110010 3

01 10 0000000 a
12 21 0000110 2 match 3
23 32 1011000 3 match 5
34 43 0010000 1
45 54 0010010 2
56 65 0010000 1
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 0101000 2 match 1 2

02 20 0001000 1
13 31 0000000 a
24 42 0010011 3 match 6
35 53 0010000 1
46 64 0010001 2
57 75 0100000 1
60 06 0000000 a
71 17 0000000 a

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0000010 1
25 52 0010010 2
36 63 0010000 1
47 74 0000000 a
50 05 0100000 1
61 16 0000100 1
72 27 0001000 1

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 0000010 1
26 62 0010101 3
37 73 0001000 1
[completion]
